zh.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Unite: 美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Askew於1586年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德。她於1617年與Samuel Fox在美國麻薩諸塞州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1645年2月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Askew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from a place in North Yorkshire named Aiskew, from Old Norse eik ‘oak’ + skógr ‘wood’, or possibly from another minor place in northern England likewise named with the same elements, such as Aiskew in Marrick (North Yorkshire) or the lost Aykescof in Preese (Lancashire). Compare Ayscue , Esco , Eskew , and Haskew .

variants.name: Askey
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Aski (Old Danish Aski, a derivative of askr ‘ash tree’).

variants.name: Escue
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Askew  . Compare   Eskew  . This surname is concentrated in TN.

variants.name: Escoe
meanings: Altered form of English   Askew  . This name occurs chiefly in GA. Compare   Esco  ,   Escue  , and   Eskew  .

variants.name: Haskew
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of Askew with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Esco
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Askew  . This is a southern name, concentrated in AL and GA. Compare   Escoe  ,   Escue  , and   Eskew  .
Americanized form of Finnish Esko, from a personal name derived from Swedish Eskil (see Eskildsen ).

variants.name: Eskew
meanings: English: variant of   Askew  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Askew was born in 1586, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. She married Samuel Fox in 1617, in Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 23 February 1645, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59.

ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Askew(은)는 1586년 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1617년 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 Samuel Fox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1645년 2월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Askew родилась в 1586 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Fox в 1617 г. в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 23 февраля 1645 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет.
